categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your first coffee — be ahead of standup. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.title: Defensive Playbooks
categories.description: Weekly deep-dives on detection engineering, incident response, and hardening guides — written for practitioners, by practitioners.

categories.title: Breach Post-Mortems
categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch
categories.description: Track patches and advisories from major vendors. Critical CVEs flagged with exploitability context — not just CVSS scores.

categories.title: Career & Community
categories.description: Curated job board, conference signal-boost, and analyst notes from the field. The defender community, in one place.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-42897: Microsoft Microsoft actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability during web page generation in Outlook Web Access and when certain interaction conditions are met, arbitrary JavaScript can be executed in the…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-20182: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller & Manager contain an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass authentication and obtain administrative privileges on an affected…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-42208: BerriAI LiteLLM actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a SQL injection vulnerability that allows an attacker to read data from the proxy's database and potentially modify it, leading to unauthorized access to the proxy and the credentials it manages.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-34234 — CRITICAL (CVSS 10.0)
briefings.excerpt: CtrlPanel is open-source billing software for hosting providers. In versions 1.1.1 and prior, the web-based installer (public/installer/index.php) is vulnerable to unauthenticated Remote Code Execution (RCE) because it performs the…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-33642 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.9)
briefings.excerpt: Kitty is a cross-platform GPU based terminal. In versions 0.46.2 and below, the handle_compose_command() function in kitty/graphics.c performs bounds validation on composition offsets using unsigned 32-bit arithmetic that is subject to…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-36829 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in the embedded HTTP server of Panabit PAP-XM320 up to and including v7.7. The server validates session cookies using a filesystem existence check based on a user-controlled cookie value…
